issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases for installation, database connection, or API usage.
The skill is limited to macOS and Linux environments, lacking support for Windows.

scenarios.name: Deploy Metabase with Postgres backend via docker-compose
scenarios.rationale: Baseline left Metabase on the default H2 backend with no Postgres service; treatment defines both services, the MB_DB_* environment variables, depends_on, and a named pg-data volume as the skill prescribes.

scenarios.name: Signed JWT embed URL for a Metabase dashboard
scenarios.rationale: Baseline signed a flat payload and pointed at /dashboard/<token>, which Metabase rejects; treatment uses the resource/params/exp payload shape and the /embed/dashboard/<token> URL exactly as the skill specifies.
